title: Book of the Dead, Spell 30B: The Heart Scarab
description: The plea to one's own heart not to testify against the soul at judgment: the most commonly inscribed funerary spell.
introduction: The plea to one's own heart not to testify against the soul at judgment: the most commonly inscribed funerary spell.

translation.original_text: jb.j n mw.t.j jb.j n ḫpr.w.j m šm ḥr.j m dꜣdꜣ.t
translation.text: O my heart of my mother, O my heart of my forms — do not stand against me as a witness.
